category_sources: Official VideoLAN page describes libdca as a free DTS Coherent Acoustics decoder.
source_facts.description says it decodes DTS Coherent Acoustics streams.
display_name_sources: Official VideoLAN page heading uses libdca.
docs_sources: Official VideoLAN developer page is the best official documentation surface found and includes description, development status, source retrieval, and support links.
repo_sources: Official VideoLAN developer page gives the Git clone URL https://code.videolan.org/videolan/libdca.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official VideoLAN page describes libdca as a DTS Coherent Acoustics decoder.
source_facts.description and executables identify DTS/DCA decoding tools.
